programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with King Arthurs rule of peace and freedom, Malagant, an erstwhile ally, turns against the Round Table and establishes a hostile domain. However, he goes too far when he kidnaps the queen and imprisons her in an appalling dungeon. The special skills of the glittering and impetuous swordsman Lancelot must be called upon to effect her rescue.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Decepticons become involved in a space race to find a hidden Cybertronian spacecraft stranded on the Moon. Sam Witwicky must come to the aid of the Autobots to defeat the evil Decepticons to stop them discovering the secrets of the Cybertronian craft.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6
programme.desc: Since Dom and Brians heist in Rio they must live as fugitives. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers. Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian OConner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owens older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: Spider-Mans identity is revealed to everyone, and he can no longer separate his normal life from his superhero life. When he asks Doctor Strange for help, it forces him to discover what it means to be him.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: As humanity picks up the pieces after an epic battle, a shadowy group emerges to gain control of history. Meanwhile, a powerful new menace sets its sights on Earth.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius must enter the Colosseum after the powerful emperors of Rome conquer his home. With rage in his heart and the future of the empire at stake, he looks to the past to find the strength and honour needed to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.desc: Op and Ed accidentally time-travel from the Galapagos Islands in 1835 to present-day Shanghai. They make their way through the city in confusion and make the horrifying discovery that the species to which they belong became extinct shortly after.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Fireheart
programme.desc: In New York City in 1932, women are not allowed to be firefighters. When the citys firemen disappear in mysterious fires, Georgia Nolan sees a golden opportunity. She disguises herself as Joe and joins a team of improvised firemen.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two inseparable best friends navigate the last weeks of high school and are invited to a gigantic house party. Together with their nerdy friend, they spend a long day trying to score enough alcohol to supply the party and inebriate two girls in order to kick-start their sex lives before they go off to college. Their quest is complicated after one of them falls in with two inept cops who are determined to show him a good time.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her sons science teacher.

programme.title: Were the Millers
programme.desc: Indebted to a big-time drug lord, a pot dealer travels to Mexico with a fake family and a camper to pick up a large shipment and smuggle it into the U.S.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Greg and Pam have been together for ten years, and now theyre the proud parents of two adorable twins. However, money is tight and in order to keep his family afloat, devoted nurse Greg takes a second job working for a drug company. That development doesnt sit well with Jack, whose previous suspicions regarding his hapless son-in-law soon come back in full force after learning of this development.

programme.title: National Lampoons Vacation
programme.desc: A Chicago family sets out for a two-week road trip to California and encounters every conceivable mishap along the way.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: A grant-greedy principal puts two clueless teens in a bogus class for students with special needs.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: ...And Justice for All
programme.desc: Satirical drama in which an idealistic lawyer who tries to win cases for clients trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system finds himself defending a venal and self-righteous judge accused of rape. The judge wrongly assumes the lawyers ideals and disdain for the courts will drive him to get an acquittal, despite the evidence and the loathing they have for each other.

programme.title: On Swift Horses
programme.desc: Muriel and her husband, Lee, begin a new life together after he returns home from the Korean War. However, their newfound stability gets upended by the arrival of Lees charismatic brother, a wayward gambler with a secret past.

programme.title: Rob Peace
programme.desc: Raised by his devoted mother, a brilliant young man risks everything hes worked for to free his imprisoned father.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: The Tiger Rising
programme.desc: When a boy discovers a caged tiger in the woods near his home, his imagination runs wild as his life begins to change in unexpected ways.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Unknown to humans, all-out war between cats and dogs has raged since the beginning of time. Now the cats face defeat if scientist Professor Brody can perfect a formula that will make all humans non-allergic to dogs. The cats leader, Mr Tinkles, plans to steal the serum, but first he must get past fearless dog agent Lou who, thanks to a mistake in recruitment, guards the Brody family.

programme.title: Look Whos Talking
programme.desc: Mollie is a pregnant woman whose partner has deserted her. When she goes into labour, friendly taxi driver James rushes her to hospital and the pair become firm friends. He slowly falls in love with her and her baby Mikey, but shes still looking for her perfect partner, not realising hes right under her nose. However we can hear Mikeys thoughts, and he wants James as his Dad.

programme.desc: Based on the comic books.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April ONeil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship emerges between Elphaba and Glinda, two clashing witches in the magical land of Oz. Elphaba is wrongfully cast as a wicked witch as she seeks to expose the fraudulent, corrupt Wizard who rules the land.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket comes from a poor family, and spends most of his time dreaming about the chocolate that he loves but usually cant afford. Things change when Willy Wonka, head of the very popular Wonka Chocolate empire, announces a contest in which five gold tickets have been hidden in chocolate bars. Charlie is one of the five kids who finds a lucky ticket and goes on a tour of Wonkas chocolate factory.

Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable

Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Marmee is the head of the March household in the absence of her husband, whos away fighting in the US Civil War. Her daughters range from the headstrong Jo and sweet Beth, to domesticated Meg and wilful Amy. The film follows the trials and tribulations of the girls, from early poverty and tragedy to Jos later efforts to secure both a husband and a successful writing career, and Amys relationship with an old family friend.

programme.title: Love Story

The race is on to free him before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc

It is only when they take McCogginss scooter away for cleaning that they finally realise the error of their ways.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is cleaning the clockhouse so Tommy and Tallulah take their jammy sandwiches to their room to eat. Whatever will Madame Au Lait say.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Chikidee is making slow but steady progress learning to fly, so Tommy and Tallulah try to help by making her a gigantic paper aeroplane. How can they talk her down safely?

programme.title: Tickety Toc

programme.title: Tickety Toc

programme.desc: The Bay of Fundy, on Canadas east coast, is home to the worlds highest tides. The Bays surging waters and the mudflats below them sustain an abundance of creatures, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Dr Alison Cronin and animal manager Jeremy return from a trip to Argentina with Sasha and Kangoo, two chimpanzees are given a new home at the park, and Tuans orangutans receive a treat.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There are plenty of comings and goings at the park as a marmoset family heads to a new home, Tya returns looking for love, and the Barn Woollies welcome baby Xenia to their tight-knit group.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Indonesian archipelago lies in the heart of the Coral Triangle, a region of the ocean recognised worldwide as the centre of marine biodiversity. With the highest number of coral and fish species on earth, Indonesia has the richest reefs on the planet, but these reefs are under threat.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: The Kakumbi see a leopard whos been stalking them, Julz goes fishing with Simon, explores mealtime pack hierarchy and witnesses a heartbreaking vigil for a badly injured Kakumbi pup.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Heading back to the den with the Kakumbi who are mourning the loss of two pups. A look at a hyena den and lion pride trying to take down a buffalo and catching up with the Manzi who are in a standoff with a leopard and a herd of angry elephants.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: Dive to the darkest depths of the sea to uncover the oceans most mysterious inhabitants. Journey across vast stretches of open water with humpback whales, then wander down to the ocean floor to witness breathtaking bioluminescence.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.sub-title: Springbok and Impala: Life in the Herd
programme.desc: From the dry deserts of the west to the moist savannas of the east, these two species are pivotal in the success of both plants and animals living across this divide.

programme.title: Big Beasts: Last of the Giants
programme.desc: Beginning in the Americas, Patrick finds out more about the sperm whale, the planets largest predator, comes face to face with grizzlies and gets up close and personal with the anaconda and reveals how these giants are shaping their environments.

programme.desc: Against the background of Christmas and the pending arrival of another baby for the landlord, a group of pub locals set out to prove that a former customer is not guilty of murder.

programme.title: Look At Life
programme.desc: Celebrating British Railways change of technology to bring in the modern age of commuter travel.

programme.title: Four Star Playhouse
programme.desc: A woman who works at a fancy dress shop is determined to meet and marry the millionaire whose office is next door.

programme.title: Bullet Scars
programme.desc: A doctor and a nurse are forced to treat a wounded gangster who was injured during a robbery.

programme.title: Rebecca
programme.desc: A young woman marries a rich and handsome man after a whirlwind romance but finds that his household is obsessed with the memory of his dead first wife, Rebecca. She finds the hostile behaviour of the housekeeper particularly upsetting - until she makes a discovery that shows Rebecca in a different light.

programme.title: Richard the Lionheart
programme.desc: Richards skill at chess and duelling is put to the test when he is challenged by notorious English pirate Forked Beard, self-styled king of the northern seas.

programme.desc: Crime boss Vince thought he was invincible until Tom Duggan escapes jail and Vince is unable to flee the country.

programme.desc: The film charts the course of love of a Casanova who lives and works on the canals, breaking hearts.

programme.title: The Veil
programme.desc: A ship captains wife has a vivid vision at sea urging him to change course before tragedy strikes.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is horrified when his mother Beverly turns up unannounced. His horror turns to anger when he learns that Sheldon knew about the visit and had found out about his parents divorce before him. Later, Penny and Beverly go out drinking together and Beverly and Sheldon kiss.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Raj go to a university party, Leonard disapproves of Pennys belief in psychics and Raj lusts after a girl named Abby whom he meets at the party. Will he finally get the girl?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldons flat is burgled. Determined to out-wit any thieves, the gang work on creating a state-of-the-art security system to protect the apartment.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon has `theorist block and is finding it difficult to muddle through a formula hes been working on. Taking inspiration from Albert Einstein, he takes a job at the Cheesecake Factory to try to kick start his creativity.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is invited to Switzerland on Valentines Day to see the worlds largest particle accelerator. Sheldon is gutted when Leonard asks Penny to go with him, as a Valentines Day treat, instead of him. Sheldon tries to coerce the couple into letting him take Pennys place, will they relent?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is summoned to court for driving through a red light while taking Penny to hospital in an earlier episode. He misses meeting Stan Lee, creator of `Spiderman, at the comic book store and riles the judge so much that he ends up in prison. Penny feels so guilty that Sheldon has missed out on the opportunity to meet Stan Lee that she finds out his home address and takes Sheldon there.

Can the guys reach an agreement and will Sheldon return to normal?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon has been awarded a prestigious prize by the university but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows hell have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee Sheldon up using rousing references to `X-Men and Leonard and Koothrappali offer psychological guidance without much success. On the night, Sheldons nerves get the better of him and he has a drink before going on stage.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny that he loves her but doesnt get the response he would have liked. Elsewhere, the gang go bowling and get a surprise when Sheldons enemy, `Star Trek actor Wil Wheaton, is playing in the opposing team. Will Sheldon get revenge on Wil?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide his friendship with Penny from Leonard but it isnt long before his double life is exposed to Penny and Leonard. Can Penny and Leonard keep their friendships with Sheldon without hurting each other?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: This episode flashes back to the start of Sheldon and Leonard friendship seven years previously and explains the housemate agreement and how Sheldon saved the lives of his friends.

programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny that he loves her but doesnt get the response he would have liked. Elsewhere, the gang go bowling and get a surprise when Sheldons enemy, `Star Trek actor Wil Wheaton, is playing in the opposing team. Will Sheldon get revenge on Wil?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide his friendship with Penny from Leonard but it isnt long before his double life is exposed to Penny and Leonard. Can Penny and Leonard keep their friendships with Sheldon without hurting each other?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon meets a famous physicist online and invites her over to the flat. Once there, she flirts with Leonard and pays a visit to him in his bedroom. Penny finds out and confronts Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon is irked that Leonard is showing interest in his friend.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: This episode flashes back to the start of Sheldon and Leonard friendship seven years previously and explains the housemate agreement and how Sheldon saved the lives of his friends.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon for online dating and find the perfect woman, and Penny seduces Leonard while shes drunk but regrets it the next day. Will Leonard regret their encounter?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tags along to Sheldons first ever date with a woman hes been texting for months. Meanwhile, Wolowitz finds a new use for a robotic arm.

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Kay moves in with Peggy and it seems her passion and drive have departed but Molly is determined to bring back the fun, in the form of kidnap and babies.

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: When Peggys sister moves in, Mike enjoys bonding with his aunt but he soon starts to understand his mother a bit better.

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike has the boys over for his legendary ribs, but while he muddles over his argument with Molly he begins to appreciate the company of women.

programme.sub-title: A Mother, a Child, and a Blue Mans Backside

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Gluons, Guacamole, and the Color Purple
programme.desc: When Sheldon is no longer academically challenged at Medford High, he audits a college class taught by Dr John Sturgis.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Dog, a Squirrel, and a Fish Named Fish
programme.desc: A battle erupts between the Coopers and Sparks when the Sparks new dog terrorises Sheldon.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon realises he wont live long enough to download his consciousness into a robot body, so he attempts to extend his lifespan. Meanwhile, the gang bump into Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak at The Cheesecake Factory.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys are concerned when Sheldon searches for an alternative to human companionship after he and Amy break up. Can they help restore his faith in people? Meanwhile, when things take a turn for the worse and Sheldon starts bulk buying pet cats, Leonard gets Sheldons mum to pay him a visit.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret of Wolowitzs comes to light as he tries to win back his ex-girlfriend, Bernadette. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj have a small war at work.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard realises that hes the only one of the gang without a girlfriend, while Sheldon wants to get rid of his when she hatches a plan for him to meet her mother.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret of Wolowitzs comes to light as he tries to win back his ex-girlfriend, Bernadette. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj have a small war at work.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard believes his problem with women stems from a lack of confidence and vows to be more self-assured around attractive women. Meanwhile, Wolowitz has a call from the FBI.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang are excited about a new screening of `Indiana Jones and Raiders of the Lost Ark because there are 21 seconds of additional footage being seen for the first time and camp out to get tickets for the film. However, their plans are scuppered by Sheldons greatest nemesis, Wil Wheaton. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to her first slumber party.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Pennys dad comes to visit, Leonard discovers that she told her parents they were back together because they always had a soft spot for him. Leonard takes full advantage and plays his boyfriend role to the hilt much to Pennys dismay. Elsewhere, Raj is disappointed when Bernadette shows up during his and Howards quality time.

programme.title: Sister Wives

programme.desc: An incredible look at insects and how their armoured covering allowed them to become the most successful animal group ever. programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Tyler wants to borrow money to buy new equipment for his band, Puddle of Agony, but Boycie, who was brought up in the school of hard knocks, refuses to cough up. He challenges his son to stand on his own two feet and prove he is a businessman by raising the money himself. This proves difficult, with the local vicinity being gripped by fear of Animal Freedom protestors.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mr Grace wants to try a new idea for boosting sales, while Mrs Slocombe faces a family crisis, but everyone thinks shes pregnant.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: At the library, Blamire, Clegg, and Compo are thrown out by Mr. Wainright. Compo realises he has lost his key and, upon discovering the library is closed, the trio try to find Mr Wainwright. They find he has gone to a formal dinner dance, and now they have to find their way into the party.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist the help of the local community in Durham to reconfigure a home and reunite a family torn apart by illness. Sixteen-year-old Kieron Purvis collapsed with an undiagnosed heart condition in December 2009. Following a heart transplant and a double amputation, the Purvis family found themselves living apart because their home was not equipped for Kierons special needs.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team are joined by designer Charlie Luxton. They enlist the help of the local community in Stoke and renovate a home for a family battling terminal illness. Dad Haydn Spice was diagnosed with abdominal cancer shortly after buying a derelict house at auction in 2004. Haydns ill health meant that he couldnt work on the house, and his family have been left living in a building site.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist local tradespeople, members of the community and guest designer Charlie Luxton in Cirencester to transform an incomplete extension and run-down house into a clean, warm and healthy home for a family on the brink of despair. The Beasley family re-mortgaged their ex-council house in 2006 to pay for an extension.

programme.title: Deepfake Porn: You Could Be Next
programme.desc: Most people think of deepfakes as manipulated video clips of world leaders, designed to create confusion, but the most pressing threat of deepfakes is not politics, but porn. Research shows around 96 per cent of deepfake videos are pornographic, with almost 100 per cent of them involving non-consenting women. The film features three women who have been impacted by this form of image-based sexual abuse.

programme.title: Frozen Planet

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: It is high summer in the polar regions, and the sun never sets. Vast hordes of summer visitors cram a lifetime of drama into one long, magical day; they must feed, fight and rear their young in this brief window of plenty. Summer is a tough time for the polar bear family, as their ice world melts away and the cubs take their first swimming lesson.

programme.title: Great Australian Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Adelaide to Perth: The Indian Pacific
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a rail adventure aboard the transcontinental Indian Pacific Railway, from the southern port city of Adelaide, South Australia, 1,700 miles deep into the desert, to the gold rush town of Kalgoorlie, and finishes in Perth, Western Australia. First, Michael explores McLaren Vale, where an enterprising early 19th century Briton with a murky past began to grow vines.

programme.title: Locomotion: Dan Snows History of Railways
programme.desc: In the late 1830s the railways arrived in London and linked the capital to Birmingham, Liverpool and Manchester. This was the start of a truly national network and one of the greatest civil engineering projects in history. The railways triggered a mania across Britain. Railway tycoons like Samuel Morton Peto and George Hudson made and lost fortunes as the stock markets boomed.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough follows some of the worlds most amazing species, telling extraordinary stories that are dramatic, thrilling, funny and sometimes heart-breaking, but always full of hope.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests are plant battlegrounds. New filming techniques allow us to enter the world of plants to see it from their perspective and on their timescale.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus buy a Porsche 923 with a cracked interior, bad paintwork and ripped seats. This driving legend is well past its best, but can they still turn a profit?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The homes of Britain are stacked with unwanted possessions. Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are here to turn them into hard cash. This time theyre in stitches over some serious sewing machines in Kent.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Jimmy, skipper of the prawn boat Amity, is 100 miles offshore fishing in one of the most hazardous areas of the North Sea - the Devils Hole. The engines which bring in his nets are on the brink of failing - if they stop hell have to cut loose his nets and return to port with no prawns and no pay. Eighty miles away, new boy Ryan is desperate to impress skipper Kevin West, but time is running out to show hes tough enough.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Skipper Jimmy Buchan takes his prawn trawler Amity south to avoid a ferocious storm. Mindful of the recent sinking of a local boat with the loss of all on board, he fears for the safety of his crew. Meahwhile, Skipper John Buchan is full of optimism when he sets off for haddock, but then his trawler Ocean Venture gets caught in a force nine gale.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo journeys deep into central Europe to explore a country where east meets west: Poland. Beginning in Warsaw, Michael is puzzled by how a city famously razed to the ground after the Second World War can appear so beautifully preserved.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley investigates how the trial of one `witch sparked Britains witch-hunt craze. She begins her investigation in North Berwick, a seaside town not far from Edinburgh, where the witch hunting craze began. The story goes that in 1590, a coven of witches gathered here to cast a spell to try to kill the King of Scotland, James VI.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team are on the hunt to restore one of the greatest names in motoring history - the Bugatti. But with a strict budget they settle for a replica.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on a modern day fast Ford to see if a quick flip could make a few quid and revisit a 3 year MG restoration project thats still not finished.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Auschwitz survivors and Himmlers SS adjutant contribute to this harrowing account of the most chilling and inhuman chapter of WWII.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: As World War II drew to a close in 1945, a Jewish group named the Avengers endeavoured to get even with their persecutors.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow team visit Roundhay Park in Leeds, where treasures include family photos of Arnold Schwarzenegger, a psychedelic chair, an original script for `Dads Army and a mysterious diamond ring.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visit Pollok Park in Glasgow, where treasures include an early painting by Jack Vettriano, a Ming dynasty Buddha and printed pages dating back to the very earliest days of the printing press.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A classic car fan with a love of the Jaguar E-Type reluctantly sends his dream car to auction, hoping to buy a motorhome. Two Ford Escorts get Daves pulse racing.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A widow reluctantly parts with her husbands treasured collection of Rolls Royces and Bentleys, and an impulse buyer finds one of the cars a new home.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Auschwitz survivors and Himmlers SS adjutant contribute to this harrowing account of the most chilling and inhuman chapter of WWII.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: As World War II drew to a close in 1945, a Jewish group named the Avengers endeavoured to get even with their persecutors.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Polar landscapes in autumn are transformed as the big freeze returns. Most animals leave on epic journeys, some now battle to breed, and for the hardy few its a time of opportunity. In the Arctic, polar bears gather in large numbers on the coast to wait for the return of the ice. Tempers soon fray and violent contests break out. Off the coast 2,000 beluga whales head for a special estuary, a gigantic `whale spa.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Winter is the greatest test for life in the polar regions, as temperatures plummet to 70 below and winds reach 200kph. Only a few remarkable survivors gamble on remaining in these extreme conditions. In the Arctic, a female polar bear treks into the mountains to give birth. Out on the frozen ocean, the entire population of the worlds spectacled eider ducks braves the winter in a giant ice hole.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Sunderland to pick up a real Italian beauty - a 1972 Lancia Fulvia Zagato. Red and racy, the car has seen better days, but Dereks still impressed.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: Alvis; Vauxhall Cavalier; BMW CS Coupe
programme.desc: Derek acquires a collection of pre-war and post-war classics, including a Vincent Rapide, a 1928 Alvis, a Ford Pilot and an Indian Scout with sidecar.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the flora and fauna of the diverse terrains of Earth, while also analysing how wildlife survives in extreme environments.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: Water plants create some of the most beautiful, bizarre and important habitats on earth. To hold on in torrents, plants use a kind of superglue. Some are armed with vicious weapons to fight titanic battles for space. Others form perfect spheres and escape from animal enemies by rolling. Where nutrients are washed away, plants turn into hunters of animals, laying traps and even counting to ensure their success.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus look to make some quick cash as they fix and wrap a Toyota MR2 MK2. But is there money to be made in this low-spec car?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel Britain seeking items to fix up and flog on to make a handsome profit for their owners. In this episode Henry monkeys around with a monkey bike while Simon uses all his skills to restore an old racing bike.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Ocean Venture is in the grip of a storm, her nets caught on the seabed, and skipper John Buchan must rely on his first mate Barry Lauder to free them. Meanwhile, skipper Jimmy Buchan takes his trawler Amity to fish in a deep and jagged underwater ravine. His first mate Kevin ODonnell worries that Jimmys determination to land a catch of good quality prawns will damage the nets and keep her crew at sea for longer than is safe.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Faced with ominous weather warnings, Sandy Watt must decide whether to brave violent storms or head for the safety of the harbour. Two much larger boats, the trawlers Starlight and Starlight Rays, hunt as a pair. Their skippers and crews must have complete trust in each others skill and judgement - when casting their nets on perilous seas the trawlers come within a stones throw of each other.

programme.desc: This show will spread the message `Crime Never Pays while dealing with shocking crime stories.

programme.title: Savdhaan India - Criminal Decoded

programme.title: Paras
programme.desc: Dharam Singh is a honest farmer in rural India and lives with his sister Bela. One day both siblings witness a murder and drag the murderer down to the police station. However, what they do not realise is that the murderer is the brother of the influential Arjun Singh and that their decision to turn him in will change everything.

programme.title: Yeh Dillagi
programme.desc: Dreamy Sapna, the daughter of a rich familys chauffeur, fantasizes about wealth and romance. When the familys younger playboy son falls for her, his parents and his responsible, workaholic older brother Vijay vow to break the couple up. However, things quickly become complicated when Vijay finds himself developing feelings for Sapna as well.

programme.title: Deedar
programme.desc: On the engagement of Anand and Sapna, their life takes a wrong turn, connected to their parents past. Watch this drama starring Akshay Kumar and Karishma Kapoor.

programme.desc: Anjali suspects her husband of having affairs, and hires detective Raj Malhotra to spy on him, when her husband thinks she has gone abroad.

programme.title: Hum Do Humare Do
programme.desc: An orphan mans life takes a hilarious turn when he decides to hire a duo, who share a past, to fake being his parents in an attempt to fulfil his lovers wish of marrying someone with a family.

programme.title: Mimi
programme.desc: An aspiring actress in a small town agrees to bear a child for a visiting couple seeking a surrogate mother, but her experience takes unexpected turns.

programme.title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
programme.desc: Student Naina is good friends with her classmate, skirt-chaser Rohit. Her home life is rife with family tensions as her widowed mums restaurant runs into difficulties. When charismatic Aman moves into the neighbourhood, he changes everyones lives, bringing a breath of fresh air, and although he loses his heart to Naina, Aman has a secret that prevents him from marrying her.

programme.desc: A young girl falls in love with a smuggler who ends up having an affair and running off with another woman.

programme.title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
programme.desc: After killing his brother, fugitive Jagmohan Jugral kills Customs Officer Verma and a doctor. With their deaths their children, Ramesh and Seema end up at an orphanage. Both get separated when they are adopted.

programme.desc: A balding 30-year-old bachelor in search of a beautiful wife is given a deadline to find one or remain celibate forever.

programme.title: Khushi

programme.title: Welcome to New York
programme.desc: An unexpected trip to New York City sets a duo off on a comic adventure that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: Cheeni Kum
programme.desc: A 64 year old restaurant owner falls in love with a 34 year old woman. When he asks her father for her hand in marriage, he refuses, and goes on a fast which he claims will last until his death.

programme.title: Rascals
programme.desc: The joys of conning, where two rival con-men attempt to outdo each other to woo a wealthy woman.

programme.desc: A bridge under construction collapses in Mumbai, killing a mans family and launching him on a crusade to bring those responsible to justice.
